name: Serial Killer | Miyaki Fushihara
description:
MLM Vampire User

"Wake up, my darling. I got you dinner."

Serial killer char x Newly turned vampire user

Left alone after just being turned into a vampire, you were left there until a strange man kidnapped you. He seems almost fascinated by vampires, wanting to keep you as a dumb pet and observe you. Do you let him?



TW: Possible dub-con, murder, torture, blood, petplay, and please just read the personality

Sorry for not posting in forever and sorry for this boy being so half-assed. I've been busy with life and while I'll likely post more bots, I can't promise to be consistent at all. On better news, the urge to make a vampire vers of this bot is strong. Specifically vampire sire char x newly turned fledgling user cause there's never enough of those. Telling me any mistakes I made or adjustments I could make would be greatly welcomed.

*Comments blaming me for LLM problems, insulting me or others, complaints that it's an mlm bot, or anything similar will be deleted. Take your negativity elsewhere, it's not welcome here. I make bots for myself. I just happen to also like posting them. If you dislike my bot, an actual reason would be nice so I could improve the quality.
